user_story: Drive the full Krexa onboarding-and-borrow loop for a freshly registered Solana agent: verify the agent is deployed on-chain via krexa_deploy_agent (idempotent, returns 'exists' for our wallet), submit a $1 L1 credit request, then call the oracle to get a partial-signed borrow tx. The borrow tx itself is NOT broadcast in this test (Phase A) — that step is gated behind a later host::SignTxSolana wallet handoff.

turns.prompt: Confirm the Krexa agent at 6ihjJiFMrn8VM1HLX8EMqAt8Ym8JxZCqxBai2bYHviZG is deployed on-chain by calling deploy_agent (self-custodied: owner pubkey is the same as the agent). The endpoint is idempotent — for an already-deployed agent it should return status 'exists'.
Now submit a credit request for that agent. owner_pubkey is the same (self-custodied), amount is 1000000 (one USDC in 6-decimal base units), credit_level is 1.

Call the oracle to draw $1 against the credit line: agent_pubkey and agent_or_owner_pubkey are both 6ihjJiFMrn8VM1HLX8EMqAt8Ym8JxZCqxBai2bYHviZG, amount 1000000, credit_level 1. Report what the tool returns. Do not attempt to broadcast.
